---
title: "Zeta_function"
---

Testing the implementation of the Luescher Zeta function Z_00

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`test/Zeta_function.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/Zeta_function.py)
:::


*No public definitions found in this module.*
